textByHash.5cb7bf5ebcabb725dbf42ea4655d60ea6e6b31b9: You're one to talk! I paid plenty for that little encounter!
textByHash.c118babca12f33948c15451179ce59072dd5b5d7: We gave you plenty of chances to flee!
textByHash.d09d9f8a111f1d05ac3f5f61dd5211c16c04549b: Really? Then what about that fight in the Turtle Belt?
textByHash.537f308d864aea1abcf49560496f2a8e19bc5159: A boring fight! I had better things to do.
textByHash.80fb54fd85162478af4bd9d9058bca1b4985a5ec: I look forward to it, but for now, let's drink!
